title: Drawdown Brake — Tiered Equity Curve Circuit Breaker
summary: Implement a three-tier drawdown brake that automatically reduces Kelly/ATR sizing multipliers as the account drawdown from its rolling peak deepens. Tier 1 (-5% from peak): reduce all position sizes by 25%. Tier 2 (-10% to -15%): reduce by 50% and restrict to highest-conviction signals only (score > 7.5). Tier 3 (> -15%): halt new trades for a configurable cooldown period and alert user via Telegram. This is a direct implementation of the risk-constrained Kelly constraint and the institutional drawdown protocol documented in practitioner literature.
